A full round lasts five minutes. Seven times, opponents haven't survived the first hundred seconds. That's the energy this capsule walks out with.

The Origin

An arachnophobic kid who raised 200 spiders.

Jalin Turner didn't pick a nickname. He built an identity out of the thing that scared him most. A kid from San Bernardino, terrified of spiders — so he raised two hundred tarantulas until the fear had nowhere left to hide.

That's what walks to the cage: first-round finisher energy and a fear faced head-on. This isn't a name slapped on a blank tee. It's a story you wear.

Wear The Story
200Fears Conquered
